## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's frustrating about the current experience?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Who Benefits

- [ ] Nursing students
- [ ] Educators
- [ ] Self-hosted users
- [ ] Everyone

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or additional context.
